name: saishumin
description: A browser game built with Effect, lit-html, and Otaku.

scripts.check:all: bun typecheck && bun test && bun check
scripts.otaku:update: git submodule update --init vendor/otaku && git -C vendor/otaku fetch origin && git -C vendor/otaku switch main && git -C vendor/otaku pull --ff-only origin main
scripts.references:update: git submodule update --init --recursive reference_repositories/effect-smol reference_repositories/mattpocock-skills && git -C reference_repositories/effect-smol fetch origin && git -C reference_repositories/effect-smol switch main && git -C reference_repositories/effect-smol pull --ff-only origin main && git -C reference_repositories/mattpocock-skills fetch origin && git -C reference_repositories/mattpocock-skills switch main && git -C reference_repositories/mattpocock-skills pull --ff-only origin main
scripts.all:update: bun references:update && bun otaku:update && bun chore:update
